title: Admin verifies Extend Recurrence button visible on recurring lesson schedule
description: AC 01.1 / AC 01.3 - Decision Table: Verify button is present for all recurring schedule types (daily, weekly, custom).
preconditions:
Admin user has created:
- A daily recurring lesson schedule
- A weekly recurring lesson schedule
- A custom recurring lesson schedule
steps_actions:
1. "Open Lesson Schedule detail page of the daily recurring lesson"
2. "Open Lesson Schedule detail page of the weekly recurring lesson"
3. "Open Lesson Schedule detail page of the custom recurring lesson"
steps_result:
1. "User sees "Extend Recurrence" button"
2. "User sees "Extend Recurrence" button"
3. "User sees "Extend Recurrence" button"

title: Extend Recurrence button hidden for one-time lesson schedule
description: AC 01.3 - Decision Table: Button must not appear when is_recurring = FALSE (one-time lesson).
preconditions: Admin user has created a one-time lesson schedule
steps_actions:
1. "Open Lesson Schedule detail page of the one-time lesson"
2. "Inspect action buttons area"
steps_result:
1. "User does NOT see "Extend Recurrence" button"
2. "Only applicable action buttons are shown (no Extend Recurrence)"

title: Extend Recurrence button hidden for course schedule lesson
description: AC 01.3 - Decision Table: Button must not appear for course schedule lessons.
preconditions: Admin user has created a course schedule lesson
steps_actions:

2. "Inspect action buttons area"
steps_result:
1. "User does NOT see "Extend Recurrence" button"
2. "Only applicable action buttons are shown (no Extend Recurrence)"

title: Click Extend Recurrence button opens Lesson Creation Form

- End Time = 10:00
- Duration = 60 min
- Teaching Medium = Offline
- Lesson Name = "Math Recurring"

3. "Fields accept new values successfully"

title: Edit at original/extended boundary with "Apply this and the following" updates all extended lessons
description: AC 02.1 - State Transition: Edit the LAST lesson of the original chain and verify all extended lessons are updated.
preconditions:
Admin has created a daily recurring lesson schedule with 5 original lessons
Extended by End Date creating 3 new lessons (total 8)
steps_actions:
1. "Open the 5th lesson (last of original chain / boundary)"
2. "Click Edit, change lesson time to 14:00-15:00"
3. "Select "Apply this and the following""
4. "Save"
5. "Check lesson 5"
6. "Check lessons 6-8 (extended lessons)"
7. "Check lessons 1-4 (before boundary)"

2. "Time updated"

4. "Save successful"
5. "Lesson 5: time = 14:00-15:00"
6. "Lessons 6-8: time = 14:00-15:00"
7. "Lessons 1-4: original time unchanged"

2. "New time = 14:00-15:00"
3. ""
4. ""
5. ""
6. "Verify extended chain updated"
7. "Verify previous chain not affected"

title: One-time lesson edit does not cascade to extended recurring chain
description: AC 02.1 - Decision Table + Negative Testing: Editing a one-time lesson must only affect that single lesson.
preconditions:
Admin has created a recurring lesson schedule with extended lessons
A one-time lesson exists in the same Lesson Schedule (created via Add Lesson manually)
steps_actions:
1. "Open the one-time (manual) lesson"
2. "Click Edit, change lesson name and time"
3. "Save"
4. "Verify no recurring popup is shown"
5. "Check all recurring and extended lessons"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail opens"
2. "Fields updated"
3. "Save successful without recurring options"
4. "No "Apply this and the following" popup shown"
5. "All recurring and extended lessons are unchanged"
steps_data:
1. ""
2. "Edit name and time"
3. ""
4. ""
5. "Verify no cascading effect"

title: Manual lesson not affected by recurring "Apply this and the following" edit after extension
description: AC 02.1 - Negative Testing: Manually created lesson in the schedule must remain unchanged when recurring edit is applied.
preconditions:
Admin has created a daily recurring lesson schedule with 5 lessons
Manually added a lesson (lesson manual) between lesson 3 and 4
Extended by End Date creating 3 new lessons
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson 2 (before lesson manual)"
2. "Click Edit, change lesson name to "Recurring Update""
3. "Select "Apply this and the following""
4. "Save"
5. "Check the manually created lesson"
6. "Check lessons 3-5 and extended lessons 6-8"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail opens"
2. "Name updated"
3. "Recurring update selected"
4. "Save successful"
5. "Manual lesson: name unchanged, NOT affected by recurring edit"
6. "Lessons 3-8: name = "Recurring Update" (all recurring lessons updated)"
steps_data:
1. ""
2. "New name = "Recurring Update""
3. ""
4. ""
5. "Manual lesson should be isolated"
6. "All recurring lessons (original + extended) updated"

title: Assign student and teacher with "Apply this and the following" propagates to extended lessons
description: AC 02.2 - Pairwise + Regression: Assign from a lesson before the extension point, verify both old and extended lessons get the assignment.
preconditions:
Admin has created a daily recurring lesson schedule with 5 original lessons
Extended by End Date creating 3 new lessons (total 8)
Student A and Teacher A exist and are eligible
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson 2 (before extension point)"
2. "Assign Student A with "Apply this and the following""
3. "Assign Teacher A with "Apply this and the following""
4. "Check lessons 2-5 (original chain)"
5. "Check lessons 6-8 (extended lessons)"
6. "Check lesson 1 (before assignment point)"
7. "Student A login Mobile"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail opens"
2. "Student A assigned"
3. "Teacher A assigned"
4. "Student A and Teacher A assigned to lessons 2-5"
5. "Student A and Teacher A assigned to lessons 6-8 (extended)"
6. "Lesson 1: no Student A or Teacher A"
7. "Student A sees lessons 2-8 with correct information"
steps_data:
1. ""
2. "Student = Student A"
3. "Teacher = Teacher A"
4. "Verify original chain"
5. "Verify extended chain"
6. "Not affected"
7. "Mobile verification"

title: Assign student and teacher with "Apply this and the following" from within extended range
description: AC 02.2 - Pairwise: Assign from an extended lesson, verify only following extended lessons get the assignment.
preconditions:
Admin has created a recurring lesson schedule
Extended creating 5 new lessons (lessons 6-10)
Student B and Teacher B exist
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson 7 (2nd extended lesson)"
2. "Assign Student B and Teacher B with "Apply this and the following""
3. "Check lessons 7-10 (following extended lessons)"
4. "Check lessons 1-6 (original + first extended)"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail opens"
2. "Student B and Teacher B assigned"
3. "Student B and Teacher B present in lessons 7-10"
4. "Lessons 1-6: no Student B or Teacher B"
steps_data:
1. ""
2. "Student = Student B, Teacher = Teacher B"
3. "Verify following extended lessons"
4. "Not affected"

title: Unassign student and teacher with "Apply this and the following" propagates to extended lessons
description: AC 02.2 - Regression: Unassign from before extension point, verify removal in all following lessons including extended.
preconditions:
Admin has created a recurring lesson schedule, extended with new lessons
Student A and Teacher A assigned to all lessons (1-8) via "Apply this and the following"
steps_actions:
1. "Open lesson 3"
2. "Unassign Student A with "Apply this and the following""
3. "Unassign Teacher A with "Apply this and the following""
4. "Check lessons 3-8 (original + extended after unassignment)"
5. "Check lessons 1-2 (before unassignment point)"
6. "Check lesson allocation for Student A"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson detail opens"
2. "Student A removed"
3. "Teacher A removed"
4. "No Student A or Teacher A in lessons 3-8"
5. "Lessons 1-2: Student A and Teacher A still present"
6. "Student sessions deleted for affected lessons, Lesson Allocated count decreased, Lesson Allocation Status and Report History updated"
steps_data:
1. ""
2. "Unassign Student A"
3. "Unassign Teacher A"
4. "Verify removal in all following"
5. "Not affected"
6. "Check: Lesson Allocated, Allocation Status, Report History"
